title: Caterpack Enviro Range Wooden Knives Made from sustainably sourced Birchwood, compostable and Biodegradable, 100 Pack
features: Caterpack Enviro Range Wooden Knives, fully biodegradable, making an excellent alternative to disposable plastic cutlery.
Made from 100% Birchwood, entirely natural, no added coatings, stains or dyes.
Splinter free, smooth texture, lightweight and durable, even cuts through the trickiest of foods like apples.

Our selection of wooden cutlery are a perfect choice for parties, weddings, BBQ's, outdoor events and even daily home use. These disposable wooden knives are not only stress-free making for easy clean-up but also an eco-friendly alternative.
Caterpack Enviro Range Wooden Knives are perfect for all your on-the-go needs and you can rest easy knowing they are sustainably sourced and support FSC sources.
